loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy consumption for the panel's outgoing feeders (UPS, BPDP, HHF). Per-member breakdown is aggregated from member meters; rated/contracted lines are omitted as nameplate ratings are unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live active/reactive power from outgoing feeders; capacity and peak markers are omitted because the panel's rated kVA is unknown and load factor is not measured.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing worst peak power and UPS/BPDB demand trends; Load Factor and HHF demand are not measured (no HHF feeders on this panel, and Load Factor requires a rated capacity which is unknown).
